content.problemStatement:
You‚Äôre given a sequence AAA of size NNN. Your task is to choose a non-empty subsequence BBB of AAA to maximize f(B)f(B)f(B).

Here, f(B)f(B)f(B) is defined as ‚à£B‚à£+gcd(B1,B2,‚Ä¶,B‚à£B‚à£)|B|+gcd(B_1,B_2,\ldots,B_{|B|})‚à£B‚à£+gcd(B1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,B‚à£B‚à£‚Äã), where ‚à£B‚à£|B|‚à£B‚à£ is the size of BBB and gcd(B1,B2,‚Ä¶,B‚à£B‚à£)gcd(B_1,B_2,\ldots,B_{|B|})gcd(B1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,B‚à£B‚à£‚Äã) is the greatest common divisor of all numbers in BBB.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚ãØ‚Äâ,ANA_1,A_2,\cdots,A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚ãØ,AN‚Äã.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line - the maximum value of f(B)f(B)f(B).
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 4‚ãÖ1054 \cdot 10^54‚ãÖ105.
